name: Orange Yogurt Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Mix in the currants.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg; then blend in the yogurt, margarine or butter, orange rind, and juice.
3. Stir the mixture into the flour mixture just until moistened.
4. Spoon the batter into large greased or paper-lined muffin cups, filling them to the top.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for 25 minutes, or until firm to the touch. Makes 11 muffins.
